person_name: Heraclas of Alexandria, Bishop of Alexandria (early 3rd century)
person_name_full: Heraclas of Alexandria, Bishop of Alexandria (early 3rd century)
notes: Bishop of Alexandria in the early 3rd century, known for ascetic and philosophic life, succeeded Demetrius.

docs.title: Ecclesiastical History, Book 6
docs.author: Eusebius
docs.excerpt: … abundant evidence of a philosophic and ascetic life, was esteemed worthy to succeed Demetrius in the bishopric of Alexandria. 3. He was in his eighteenth year when he took charge of the catechetical school.
